title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that AI and Bitcoin together enable a new class of "sovereignpreneurs" – solo builders with sovereignty over money, production, and their time. He contends that bringing your own agent (BYOA) is the future of work, combining Bitcoin's monetary sovereignty with AI's labor leverage via a "sovereignty stack" of tools and practices.
